amending_title: REGULATION (EU) 2020/1503 OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL of 7 October 2020 on European crowdfunding service providers for business, and amending Regulation (EU) 2017/1129 and Directive (EU) 2019/1937 (Text with EEA relevance)

analysis.amending_text: (k)	an offer of securities to the public from a crowdfunding service provider authorised under Regulation (EU) 2020/1503 of the European Parliament and of the Council[[FN:3]], provided that it does not exceed the threshold laid down in point (c) of Article 1(2) of that Regulation.
analysis.source_instruction: In Article 1(4) of Regulation (EU) 2017/1129, the following point is added:
analysis.best_match_text: (i) remuneration reports as referred to in Article 9b of Directive 2007/36/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council;

note: Two-phase amendment application: identified relevant provisions are applied. Replacements are attempted first; unresolved replacement instructions are left as analysis_only (never inserted) to avoid creating duplicated legal provisions. In strict doubt mode, unresolved low-confidence items are intentionally deferred as analysis_only.

operations.source_instruction: In Article 1(4) of Regulation (EU) 2017/1129, the following point is added:
operations.amending_text: (k) an offer of securities to the public from a crowdfunding service provider authorised under Regulation (EU) 2020/1503 of the European Parliament and of the Council[[FN:3]], provided that it does not exceed the threshold laid down in point (c) of Article 1(2) of that Regulation.
